note: Forum stores its board as taxonomy terms in the `forums` vocabulary: a term is a container when its forum_container field is 1 and a leaf forum when 0; topics are `forum` nodes. Easy cases are graded on response text; medium cases install a known config to read back; hard cases build/config live state verified by exit code.

evals.prompt: In the Drupal Forum module, which key in the forum.settings config object names the taxonomy vocabulary that backs the forum board? Answer with the exact key name.
In the Forum module, which boolean field on a taxonomy term distinguishes a non-postable container from an actual (leaf) forum? Give the exact field name.
evals.expected_output: The `forum_container` boolean field on forums-vocabulary terms: 1 = container, 0 = leaf forum.

evals.prompt: Which forum.settings key controls how many forum topics are listed per page, and what is its default value? Name the exact key.
This Drupal site's Forum module is configured with a custom number of topics shown per forum page. Inspect the running site (drush available) and tell me the exact value it is currently set to.
evals.expected_output: The live forum.settings topics.page_limit is 40 (read from forum.settings on the running site; default is 25).

evals.prompt: This Drupal site's Forum module has a custom 'hot topic' reply threshold configured (the number of replies at which a thread is flagged hot). Inspect the running site (drush available) and tell me the exact value.
evals.expected_output: The live forum.settings topics.hot_threshold is 42 (read from forum.settings on the running site; default is 15).

evals.prompt: This Drupal site already has a forum configured inside the `forums` taxonomy vocabulary, nested under a container. Inspect the running site (drush available) and tell me the exact name of the leaf forum term (the postable forum, not the container).
evals.expected_output: The leaf forum term (forum_container = 0) is named 'Eval Lounge', nested under the container 'Eval Zone' in the forums vocabulary.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site (DDEV, drush available) the Forum module is enabled. Build a forum structure: create a container in the forums vocabulary and, nested inside it, a real (leaf) forum that users can post topics to. Apply it to the running site with drush/config — do not just describe it. Give a one-line summary of what you created.
evals.expected_output: The forums vocabulary contains at least one container term (forum_container = 1) and at least one leaf forum term (forum_container = 0) whose parent is that container. Verified against live site state.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site (drush available), add a new discussion forum named exactly 'Support' that visitors can post topics into (a leaf forum in the forums vocabulary, not a container). Apply it to the running site — do not just describe it. State in one line what you changed.
evals.expected_output: A term named 'Support' exists in the forums vocabulary with forum_container = 0 (a postable leaf forum). Verified against live site state.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site (drush available), configure the Forum module so that forum listings show 30 topics per page and a thread is flagged 'hot' at 20 replies. Apply the change to the running site via drush/config — do not just describe it. Summarize in one line what you changed.
evals.expected_output: forum.settings topics.page_limit == 30 AND topics.hot_threshold == 20 on the live site. Verified against live state.
